title: AGY Research Output Schema
description: Validates the structured output that AGY produces after completing a research task. This is the primary input to the Handoff Contract's handoffContext field when routing from AGY (research) to Jules/Hermes (implementation). Preventing malformed research contexts from causing implementation failures is the core use case described in GRO-1852.

researchSummary.description: Comprehensive natural-language summary of the research performed. Should contain enough detail for a downstream implementation agent to begin work without re-searching.

evidence.description: Supporting evidence — quote, data point, reference. Empty string allowed if the finding is self-evident.

priority.description: How critical this finding is for the downstream implementation.

category.description: Category tag for grouping and routing.

keyFindings.description: Structured list of atomic findings with evidence. Each finding should be independently actionable by the downstream agent.

url.description: URL to the source page or document.

accessedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the source was accessed.

relevance.description: How directly relevant this source is to the task.

sources.description: Sources consulted during research. At minimum, each entry must have a URL and title.

overall.description: Overall confidence in the research findings. 'high' = multiple corroborating sources. 'uncertain' = conflicting information or insufficient data.

methodology.description: Brief description of research methodology (e.g. 'Scraped 12 competitor pages, analyzed 3 API docs, reviewed 2 Reddit threads').

limitations.description: Known limitations of this research — stale data, biased sources, incomplete coverage.

confidence.description: Confidence assessment and methodology description. Helps the downstream agent calibrate trust in the findings.

priority.description: P0 = must do, P1 = should do, P2 = nice to have, P3 = defer.

rationale.description: Why this action is recommended, referencing specific findings.

recommendedActions.description: Suggested implementation actions inferred from the research. Provides a direct bridge from research to execution.

metadata.description: Extensible key-value store for agent-specific metadata (model used, duration, token count).

issueId.description: Optional Linear issue identifier this research was performed for. Enables traceability back to the originating task.

agentVersion.description: Version of the agent that produced this output. Helps detect schema changes across agent updates.
